captions: Scored 100/100 on my financial health check 😭 apparently 'boring' finances are the goal and I finally made it.
Only 1 in 100 people score a perfect 100 on their financial wellness — turns out being 'boring' with money pays off 🤑
From skipping lattes to skipping financial stress entirely. A 100/100 score and my wallet has never been more unbothered ✨
